prompt_text:
### Demographics: 55-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 10 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia; Occasional GI side effects (nausea/loose stool)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; History of myocardial infarction
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~5 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 84.8 kg; Height 173.4 cm; BMI 28.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 115/69 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.2%; 9 months ago 7.1%; 6 months ago 7.6%; 3 months ago 7.5%; current 7.3%), FPG (12 months ago 176mg/dL; 9 months ago 160mg/dL; 6 months ago 182mg/dL; 3 months ago 170mg/dL; current 155mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 84.8kg; 9 months ago 85.1kg; 6 months ago 82.3kg; 3 months ago 78.8kg; current 84.8kg), Height (12 months ago 173.4cm; 9 months ago 173.4cm; 6 months ago 173.4cm; 3 months ago 173.4cm; current 173.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 27.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 26.0kg/m²; current 28.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 115mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 69mmHg; 9 months ago 69mmHg; 6 months ago 68mmHg; 3 months ago 69mmHg; current 69mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 66U/L; 9 months ago 54U/L; 6 months ago 49U/L; 3 months ago 54U/L; current 63U/L), AST (12 months ago 55U/L; 9 months ago 57U/L; 6 months ago 47U/L; 3 months ago 44U/L; current 59U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.2mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 28mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 28mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 24mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 22mL/min/1.73m²; current 23mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 440mg/g; 9 months ago 456mg/g; 6 months ago 433mg/g; 3 months ago 423mg/g; current 448mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 71mg/dL; 9 months ago 71mg/dL; 6 months ago 76mg/dL; 3 months ago 74mg/dL; current 73mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 46mg/dL; 9 months ago 50mg/dL; 6 months ago 47mg/dL; 3 months ago 50mg/dL; current 48mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 148mg/dL; 9 months ago 130mg/dL; 6 months ago 131mg/dL; 3 months ago 143mg/dL; current 138mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.2g/dL; 3 months ago 12.9g/dL; current 12.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
